title: Dracaena chahinianii
taxonomy: Dracaena chahinianii is classified under the family Asparagaceae. It is a species of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Yemen. Asparagaceae is a family of monocots that includes various species of plants, such as agaves and yuccas. The classification of Dracaena chahinianii places it within the subfamily Nolinoideae. This subfamily is further divided into several genera, with Dracaena being one of the most well-known.
